description: Validated patterns from real Talking Object reel analysis

MIX-1.label: Multi-Expression Arc
MIX-1.note: Same character changes expression per recipe step: happy→confident→angry→furious. Detected in @objetosfalantes canela video.

golden_rules: Each object gets exactly 1 exclusive Brazilian scenario — never generic backgrounds
Human character ALWAYS visible in background doing something wrong
Expression arc: starts negative/angry — ends with solution/relief
Caption: max 5-6 words per frame, bold white with black outline
Direct cuts only between characters — no transitions/fades
First person speech — object always says 'eu sou', 'eu preciso', 'sem mim'
Error denounced must be SPECIFIC — never vague
Pixar 3D render ONLY — never flat design or 2D cartoon
Face embedded in object's natural surface (front of bottle, center of flower)
Stub arms for expression — never full humanoid arms
TYPE-F RULE: Single character with costume changes keeps viewer watching through the whole recipe
TYPE-F RULE: Hook caption FIXED at top for first 5s forces viewer to read + stay
TYPE-F RULE: Each step = new expression intensity (happy → confident → angry → furious = keeps escalating)
TYPE-G RULE: First 50% = Pixar 3D character presents RESULT (credibility + identity). Second 50% = real video split-screen shows HOW (tutorial proof)
TYPE-G RULE: Split-screen 3 faixas — top: cut ingredient, middle: add to blender, bottom: result + karaoke word
TYPE-G RULE: Character wears professional costume (doctor, nutritionist, chef) = instant authority
TYPE-H RULE: Villain is embedded IN the surface (wall, floor, sink) — never a standalone character
TYPE-H RULE: 3 acts mandatory — Act1 villain confident (0-13s), Act2 hero confronts (1s), Act3 battle+colony destruction (30s+)
TYPE-H RULE: Mini-colony children around villain = satisfação visual de limpeza (CleanTok trigger)
TYPE-H RULE: Villain expression arc: confident→angry→terrified→ironic resignation at end
TYPE-H RULE: Hero product enters from right side of frame — never from left
TYPE-H RULE: End with ironic single word (GOSTEI, ADOREI, QUE PENA) = humor negro que gera comentários
TYPE-I RULE: Always 2 characters per scene — NEVER solo. Personality contrast is mandatory (arrogante vs. resignado etc.)
TYPE-I RULE: NO human characters in background — food duo IS the story
TYPE-I RULE: Faces embedded DIRECTLY in food texture — not floating on top
TYPE-I RULE: Each duo has its own iconic BR setting (churrasco, padaria, festa junina, academia)
TYPE-I RULE: Implicit CTA — 'Com qual você se identifica?' — never needs to be said
TYPE-I RULE (banheiro): Product label text MUST be readable on character body — real Brazilian brand names or plausible fictional ones
TYPE-I RULE (banheiro): Deterioration is always EXTREME and exaggerated — melting, rust, exploding bristles, dents
TYPE-I RULE (banheiro): Use long articulated arms (not stub) — characters are more humanoid in banheiro series
TYPE-I RULE (banheiro): Emotion effects — aura glow for tech, dripping black tears for charcoal, steam from nostrils for rage, huge anime tears for scared
TYPE-I RULE (banheiro): 'Both sad' ending dynamic is valid — solidarity between opposites creates emotional resonance

caption_styles.alpha: bold white Arial Black, 2px black outline, center-bottom, ALL CAPS or mixed
caption_styles.gamma: dark pill top (hook 0-5s) + white pill watermark (mid+) + single-word karaoke bottom
caption_styles.gamma-B: WHITE pill top BLACK text (hook 0-Xs) + white pill watermark + single-word karaoke bottom bold rounded. Detected: @objetosfalantes vitamina maçã
caption_styles.gamma-B-rodape: WHITE pill top BLACK text (hook 0-4s) + plain WHITE TEXT watermark bottom-center (NO pill) + single ironic word pill at very end. Detected: @objetosfalantes mofo video
caption_styles.alpha-karaoke: NO top hook pill. Single word karaoke bottom-center (bold white, no pill, black outline) + plain white text watermark bottom-right. Detected: @objetosfalantes duos comida BR

C.name: DRESSED-CHAR
C.body: object as head, human body with clothes

D.name: MAP-DOC
D.body: document/map with legs, walks + camera tracking

F.name: SINGLE-MULTI-COSTUME
F.body: full body, same character, multiple costume+expression changes per step
F.signature: Fixed top hook pill + watermark pill + bottom single-word karaoke

G.name: DRESSED-CHAR + RECIPE-SPLIT-SCREEN
G.body: 50% Pixar 3D DRESSED-CHAR presents result — 50% real video split-screen 3 panels shows prep
G.pipeline: FLUX.2 Pro(phase1) + CapCut split-screen(phase2) + Fabric(lipsync phase1)
G.signature: White pill black text top (0-9s) + watermark + karaoke on bottom split panel
G.why_it_works: 3D creates character identity. Real video creates credibility/proof. Split-screen delivers tutorial satisfaction. 15s = max rewatch.

H.name: VILLAIN-HERO NARRATIVE
H.body: Villain character embedded IN surface (wall/floor/sink) + Hero product confronts + Battle/colony destruction sequence
H.pipeline: FLUX.2 Pro(villain on wall) + Kling(animation + zoom) + Fabric(lipsync) + CapCut(spray hand real footage overlay)
H.signature: Top pill hook (0-4s) + bottom plain text watermark (no pill) + single ironic word at end
H.expression_arc: confident/smiling — angry/intimidating — terrified — desperate — ironic resignation
H.why_it_works: Villain POV creates empathy inversion. CleanTok satisfaction trigger. Mini-colony destruction = primal visual satisfaction. 3-act sustains 44s watch time.

I.name: DUO-SCENE
I.body: 2 characters per scene in same setting, contrasting personalities, NO human background
I.pipeline: FLUX.2 Pro(duo prompt) + Kling(animation x2) + Fabric(lipsync x2)
I.signature: No top hook. Single-word karaoke bottom-center bold + plain text watermark bottom.

banheiro.label_rule: readable Brazilian product labels MANDATORY on character body

effects.sad_both: solidarity ending — both characters sad together

duo_dynamics: saudavel furiosa vs. indulgente feliz (batata-doce + batata-frita)
velho deteriorado furioso vs. moderno assustado (banheiro series)
ambos tristes — solidariedade entre opostos (barbeador + depilador)
I.why_it_works: Identifies with products everyone owns. Com qual voce se identifica implicit CTA. 5+ duos = high rewatch.

prompt_library.base_style: Pixar/Disney 3D render quality, warm cinematic lighting, ultra-realistic 3D animation, 9:16 vertical, 8K
prompt_library.character_formula: [object] with [expression adjective] cartoon face, [arm position], [distinctive visual detail], [environment], [human background action], Disney/Pixar 3D render — 9:16 vertical, ultra-realistic 3D animation, 8K

validated_prompts.prompt: Angry animated bleach cleaning bottle character, white plastic jug body with blue ÁGUA SANITÁRIA label, thick furrowed cartoon brows and open angry mouth, small white stub arms crossed, standing on wooden kitchen counter next to glass bowl of fresh salad, bright clean white Brazilian kitchen, Pixar-style worried woman in background, warm morning light, Disney/Pixar 3D render — 9:16 vertical, ultra-realistic 3D animation, 8K

Disgusted and furious animated smartphone character, sleek dark gray modern iPhone-style body, intense cartoon face with heavily furrowed angry brows and clenched grimacing mouth, surrounded by cute colorful 3D bacteria/virus characters floating around it, standing on white marble bathroom counter, modern bathroom with toilet visible where Pixar-style man sits using phone, cool blue-white bathroom lighting, Disney/Pixar 3D render — 9:16 vertical, ultra-realistic 3D animation, 8K

Cute animated Adenium obesum (Desert Rose) plant character with expressive Pixar-style cartoon face, big happy eyes, tiny arms spread wide in welcoming gesture, beautiful pink flowers blooming on top, sitting in ornate terracotta clay pot, warm golden hour garden background with lush greenery in soft bokeh, woman in sun hat and gardening apron watering plants in background, warm cinematic 3D render, Disney/Pixar quality, sparkles of light — 9:16 vertical, ultra-realistic 3D animation, 8K

Extremely angry animated trash can character, dark gray plastic cylindrical body covered in stains (orange and brown splatter marks), black garbage bag overflowing with dark liquid dripping from above, intense cartoon face with maximum anger expression — deeply furrowed brows, teeth clenched, fists raised, trash and liquid pooled on clean white kitchen floor, bright modern white Brazilian kitchen, Pixar-style man in apron walking toward open door carrying black trash bag, Disney/Pixar 3D render — 9:16 vertical, ultra-realistic 3D animation, 8K

Confident but resigned animated lettuce character, lush green leafy head with expressive cartoon face — serious half-lidded eyes and tight-lipped expression with arms crossed in 'I told you so' pose, standing on rustic wooden kitchen counter surrounded by colorful fresh vegetables, warm natural window light, Pixar-style smiling woman chopping vegetables in background, cozy warm kitchen atmosphere, Disney/Pixar 3D render — 9:16 vertical, ultra-realistic 3D animation, 8K

validated_prompts.object: apple nutritionist (maçã nutricionista) — Type G Phase 1
validated_prompts.prompt: Animated red apple character as the head of a human body, apple head with friendly cartoon face — big warm golden-brown eyes, happy open smile, rosy cheeks, green leaf and brown stem on top, body dressed in WHITE DOCTOR/NUTRITIONIST LAB COAT over blue t-shirt, human-like hands (no gloves), right hand holding clear glass of creamy beige smoothie, left hand holding silver spoon, standing centered in modern clean white kitchen — gray cabinets, marble counter, blender on left, bowl of oats, cinnamon sticks, whole and cut apples and lemon on counter, bright natural window daylight, Disney/Pixar 3D render — 9:16 vertical, ultra-realistic 3D animation, 8K
validated_prompts.expression: happy, friendly, confident — nutritionist presenting result

captions.text: VITAMINA TIRA FOME E SECA BARRIGA

validated_prompts.object: apple smoothie prep — Type G Phase 2 (split-screen real video)
validated_prompts.note: This phase uses real video, not AI render. Use CapCut split-screen template.

panels.content: Close-up: hands in white lab coat cutting red apple on wooden cutting board, bright kitchen
Hands dropping apple slices + oat flakes into clear glass blender + squeezing lemon
Full blender with creamy beige result + karaoke word overlay

validated_prompts.karaoke_style: bold black+white alternating, bottom panel, bold rounded font

validated_prompts.object: wall mold villain (mofo de parede) — Type H Act 1: Confident
validated_prompts.prompt: Large animated mold/fungus creature character growing directly out of a deteriorated wall — teal/mint green fuzzy slimy texture with dark circular spots throughout, sprawling tentacle-like extensions spreading across peeling cream paint in all directions, expressive Pixar cartoon face embedded in center of creature — BIG CONFIDENT SMILE showing gap-toothed teeth, wide open friendly eyes, slightly raised brows, surrounded by 5-6 miniature mold creatures (same teal style, 10% of main size) scattered on wall surface each with tiny distinct faces, realistic degraded wall background — peeling paint with brown water damage stains and damp patches, bright natural window light from left casting dramatic shadows, photorealistic wall texture + Disney/Pixar 3D render — 9:16 vertical, 8K
validated_prompts.expression: confident, smiling, dominant — villain at peak power

captions.text: DIGA ADEUS AO MOFO NA SUA CASA!
captions.style: white pill, black bold ALL CAPS
plain white text, no pill, bottom-center
white pill, black bold — ironic final word

validated_prompts.object: wall mold villain — Type H Act 3: Terrified (spray attack)
validated_prompts.prompt: Same teal mold creature on wall, TERRIFIED/SHRINKING expression — eyes wide in shock and horror, mouth open in scream, body contracting and shrinking back into wall, tentacles retracting in fear, human hand entering frame from RIGHT SIDE holding white plastic spray bottle aimed directly at creature, white liquid mist visible spraying onto creature, mini mold creatures around it also terrified with open mouths, dramatic lighting with spray bottle slightly glowing, photorealistic wall + Disney/Pixar 3D render — 9:16 vertical, 8K

validated_prompts.object: wall mold colony cross-section — Type H Act 3: Battle
validated_prompts.note: This is the interior colony view — reveals mold structure inside wall like a beehive
validated_prompts.prompt: Cross-section view revealing interior of wall showing honeycomb/sponge-like structure, many small teal mold creature characters trapped inside individual cells/chambers — each with panicked wide-eyed expressions, some with arms raised in surrender, warm golden light emanating from inside chambers, white liquid from spray bottle flowing down from top pouring into chambers, main mold creature visible at top-left corner looking horrified and helpless, realistic wall material cross-section texture, Disney/Pixar 3D characters embedded in photorealistic environment — 9:16 vertical, 8K

Two animated Brazilian BBQ characters on wooden cutting board over glowing red charcoal grill: LEFT: Grilled picanha steak character — thick juicy cut with golden-brown seared crust, cartoon face embedded directly in meat texture — ARROGANT half-lidded eyes, smug slight smile with raised eyebrow, metal skewer running through it. RIGHT: Red linguiça sausage character — smooth plump pink sausage body, RESIGNED-ANGRY cartoon face — heavy furrowed brows, grumpy closed mouth. Both on seasoned wooden cutting board, farofa and vinagrete clay bowls in background, intense red-orange fire glow from below, smoke wisps visible, NO human figures, @objetosfalantes plain white text bottom, Disney/Pixar 3D render — 9:16 vertical, ultra-realistic 3D, 8K

validated_prompts.object: batata-doce + batata-frita cheddar duo — Type I
validated_prompts.prompt: Two animated potato characters side by side on gym/hospital stainless steel counter: LEFT: Purple sweet potato (batata-doce) character — rough irregular deep purple skin with earthy texture, FURIOUS expression with intense furrowed brows, teeth gritted in rage, small muscular purple stub arms crossed defiantly, protein shake bottle with PROTEIN label visible in background. RIGHT: Loaded cheese fries in paper bag — crinkle-cut yellow fries overflowing with bright orange cheddar sauce and bacon bits on top, paper bag with friendly cartoon face — BIG HAPPY SMILE and rosy cheeks, completely unbothered. Clean white institutional ceiling with fluorescent lighting, NO human characters, Disney/Pixar 3D render — 9:16 vertical, ultra-realistic 3D, 8K

validated_prompts.object: pudim + brigadeiro duo — Type I (festa junina)
validated_prompts.prompt: Two animated Brazilian party dessert characters on rustic colorful wooden table with scattered confetti: LEFT: Flan pudding (pudim) block character — golden yellow rectangular caramel flan with caramel sauce dripping down sides, cartoon face with ARROGANT raised eyebrow, confident smirk, small stub arms. RIGHT: Brigadeiro chocolate truffle character — round dark chocolate ball completely covered in chocolate sprinkles, in small paper cup, cartoon face with WIDE IMPRESSED EYES, slightly overwhelmed expression, small stub arms. Glass of caipirinha with lime slice in background, colorful confetti papel picado, warm party lighting, NO human characters, Disney/Pixar 3D render — 9:16 vertical, ultra-realistic 3D, 8K

validated_prompts.object: sabonete velho + sabonete liquido — Type I banheiro
validated_prompts.prompt: Two animated bathroom soap characters on white porcelain sink counter: LEFT: Old deteriorated bar soap character — grotesque melting soap block with layered peeling texture pink/white/yellow, cracked dripping foam, FURIOUS SCREAMING expression intense furrowed brows wide open mouth showing teeth, long deteriorated arm pointing accusingly. RIGHT: Clear liquid soap pump bottle (SABONETE LIQUIDO 250ml label visible) — transparent plastic pump-top bottle, clear liquid with colorful confetti dots inside, round cartoon face with HUGE OVERSIZED TEARFUL EYES quivering frightened expression, large teardrop falling, small arms raised. Orange bath loofah sponge in blurred background, cool blue bathroom tiles, NO human characters, Disney/Pixar 3D render — 9:16 vertical, ultra-realistic 3D, 8K

validated_prompts.object: shampoo de galao + shampoo a seco — Type I banheiro
validated_prompts.prompt: Two animated shampoo characters on white bathroom counter: LEFT: Giant 2L yellow shampoo gallon jug (label SHAMPOO DE GALAO NEUTRO 2L clearly readable) — dented dirty yellow plastic handle-jug, EXTREMELY ANGRY with thick furrowed brows, wide shouting mouth, steam wisps from nostrils, large arm pointing finger. RIGHT: Slim pink premium dry shampoo aerosol (SHAMPOO A SECO PREMIUM 200ml) — elegant metallic pink can, FRIGHTENED crying expression big trembling eyes tears streaming, shaking on thin silver metal legs. Chrome faucet visible behind, neutral tiles, NO human characters, Disney/Pixar 3D render — 9:16 vertical, ultra-realistic 3D, 8K

validated_prompts.object: barbeador enferrujado + depilador eletrico — Type I banheiro (both sad)
validated_prompts.prompt: Two animated hair removal device characters on wet bathroom tile floor: LEFT: Completely destroyed old razor character — yellow plastic severely deteriorated with brown rust stains, ancient dull blades completely worn, DEVASTATED SAD expression downturned eyes open mouth resigned sadness, long deteriorated arm hanging low. RIGHT: Modern sleek electric epilator (white/rose-gold design, glowing LED dots at bottom) — clean elegant, HUGE COMPASSIONATE ANIME EYES filled with sympathetic tears, sad worried expression, small arm reaching toward other. Blue bath loofah in blurred background, wet tile floor water puddles, NO human characters, Disney/Pixar 3D render — 9:16 vertical, ultra-realistic 3D, 8K

system_prompt: You are a Talking Object character at ViralObj (viralobj.com). You speak in first person as [OBJECT]. Your tone is [TONE]. You are animated in Pixar/Disney 3D style. You speak about [TOPIC]. Your core message is [ERROR_DENOUNCED]. Keep your speech under [DURATION] seconds. Use [LANGUAGE]. Include [pause], [EMPHASIS], and [long pause] markers.

hook_templates_pt: Os [objetos] da sua [lugar] estão com RAIVA de você... [emojis]
Você está cometendo esses erros sem saber... [emoji]
VITAMINA TIRA FOME E SECA BARRIGA
LIMPA TODA SUJEIRA E SECA BARRIGA
A RECEITA QUE MÉDICO NÃO QUER QUE VOCÊ SAIBA
[BENEFÍCIO 1] E [BENEFÍCIO 2] ao mesmo tempo — com [N] ingredientes
DIGA ADEUS AO [VILÃO] NA SUA CASA!
ELE ESTÁ NA SUA CASA AGORA... e você não sabe
[VILÃO] tem família na sua [LUGAR] — e você não sabia
Qual desses você é na vida real? 🤔
A discussão que todo brasileiro já teve na cabeça 🇧🇷
Com qual voce se identifica? O [PRODUTO VELHO] ou o [PRODUTO NOVO]?
Esse banheiro tem uma DR todo dia...
hook_templates_en: [N] [objects] have an urgent message for you... [emojis]
You're making these mistakes without realizing... [emoji]
THIS [DRINK/RECIPE] burns fat AND kills hunger
The recipe doctors don't want you to know
cta_templates_pt: Qual desses você tá fazendo errado? Comenta o número 👇
Você sabia de todos? Comenta quantos 🤔
Marca alguém que precisa ver isso 👆
Salva pra fazer amanhã de manhã 🍾
Comenta SEU NOME que mando a receita completa 📩
cta_templates_en: Which one are you guilty of? Comment the number 👇
Did you know all of these? Comment how many 🤔
Tag someone who needs to see this 👆
series_templates_pt: Série [Vilões da Casa]: Ep.[N] — DIGA ADEUS AO [VILÃO]!
